expr: (() => ({ story: document.body.classList.contains('js-story'), staticHero: document.body.classList.contains('static-hero'), canvasShown: getComputedStyle(document.getElementById('hero-canvas')).display, gsap: !!window.gsap, h1: document.querySelector('h1').textContent, gates: document.querySelectorAll('.gate').length, panels: document.querySelectorAll('.panel').length, gridLinks: document.querySelectorAll('.index-grid a').length }))()

(async () => { window.scrollTo(0, document.querySelector('#ch3').offsetTop + innerHeight * 1.2); await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,1200)); return { scrolled: scrollY, activeCard: document.querySelector('.tpl-card.active') ? document.querySelector('.tpl-card.active').textContent.slice(0,20) : null }; })()

(async () => { window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight); await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,800)); return { canvasOpacity: getComputedStyle(document.getElementById('hero-canvas')).opacity, atBottom: true }; })()
